text: Surrounded by glass and glowing blue lights, I am acutely aware of the intersection between human curiosity and technological advancement. In this research and development space, I feel a sense of anticipation and possibility, as if I am on the edge of new discoveries. The modern design and focus on R+D provoke reflection: how do we, as humans, shape and are shaped by the tools we create? The calmness of the space invites contemplation, but the pulse of innovation keeps my mind alert and hungry for insight.
